market_context:
Cohort size: 201 listings scraped in the same market.
Median nightly rate: £154.60
Median 90-day occupancy: 47.8%

title_variants: Heated Indoor Pool & Hot Tub – Rural Retreat Near BHX
Luxury 4‑Guest Home with Indoor Pool, Hot Tub
Rural 4‑Person Escape: Heated Pool, Hot Tub, Near BHX
analysis.rewritten_desc:
Welcome to your private rural sanctuary just minutes from Birmingham Airport (BHX) and the NEC. This entire home comfortably sleeps up to four guests, offering a perfect blend of luxury and seclusion. The highlight? A heated indoor swimming pool and a soothing hot‑tub, both available year‑round for relaxation after a day of travel or business. The spacious living area opens onto the pool deck, creating a bright, inviting atmosphere for evening gatherings. A fully equipped kitchen lets you prepare meals, while the cozy bedroom provides a restful night’s sleep on premium linens. With a 4.72 rating from 499 reviews, guests consistently praise the cleanliness, attentive host, and the unique indoor‑water amenities. 

Located in a peaceful countryside setting, you’re still just a short drive to Birmingham’s city centre, the National Exhibition Centre, and major transport links. Ideal for families, couples, or small business groups seeking a memorable stay with premium amenities at a competitive rate. Book now to enjoy the rare combination of a heated pool, hot tub, and tranquil rural charm—all under one roof. Your perfect base for work or leisure awaits.
analysis.photo_order_rec: Use the heated indoor pool as the cover photo—it’s the most unique, high‑value feature and will instantly grab attention in search results.
key_diagnosis: Your nightly rate of £411 is 166% above the city median (£154) while you have 22 open nights in the next 90 days; lowering the price by ~20% could boost occupancy and revenue.
The listing description is essentially blank, which hurts conversion; add a compelling 200‑300 word description that highlights the indoor pool, hot tub, rural setting, and proximity to BHX/NEC.
No amenities are listed despite having high‑value categories like outdoor space, parking, and entertainment; add these to attract guests filtering for those features.
analysis.outreach_hook: Your home is booked 76% of the next 90 days at a £411 nightly rate— that's 166% above the city median, yet 22 nights sit empty; a modest price tweak could fill them.
